My name is Jason Parry and I'm a software engineer. I love all things tech and gaming and I specifically love combining coding and electronics to produce IoT solutions. I hope this blog is informative and encourages you to explore all of the awesome things which are around in the tech and gaming space. 

So, in short, welcome to my blog. Keep an eye on this site as well as my <a href="https://medium.com/@jasp19" target="_blank">Medium blog</a> for content about software engineering, coding, electronics and gaming.

Thanks go to my wonderful girlfriend, Kelly, for her help with the design of this site. Credit also goes to <a href="https://www.11ty.dev/" target="_blank">Eleventy</a> and its derivative <a href="https://7ty.tech/" target="_blank">Seventy</a> for the templates on top of which this site is built.
